text.title: When to invoke idea-to-prod vs sibling workflows
text.summary: idea-to-prod is the umbrella shape for one-prompt autonomous builds. Sibling /faion workflows (brainstorm, sdd-batch-orchestrator, improver, media-ops, poll-agents) are invoked by name from inside the matching phase, never as a substitute for the umbrella.

list.item: "build this end-to-end" / "ship this idea" / "запусти проект сам" / "автономний білд".
"від ідеї до прод" / "idea to production" / "one prompt to ship".
An operator pasting one description plus an instruction to "drive the loop yourself" or "wake on cron".
Greenfield project that needs research, decisions, SDD, implementation, deploy, and validation — all from a single conversation root.

rule.statement: The orchestrator MUST select idea-to-prod only when the operator explicitly opts into a multi-phase autonomous loop. If the ask names a single phase (just brainstorm, just SDD, just deploy), route to that sibling workflow directly and skip the umbrella.
rule.rationale: The umbrella's per-phase scaffolding (`.product/` layout, cron tick, decisions log) is overhead when only one phase is needed. Mis-routing inflates token cost and creates unused folders that future agents must reason about.

rule.statement: When intent is ambiguous between idea-to-prod and a single sibling workflow, the orchestrator MUST ask via the platform user-choice primitive with 2-3 candidate routes and explicit trade-offs.
rule.rationale: Single-option prompts are rubber stamps. The operator is the one who knows whether this is a one-shot or a multi-phase build; the orchestrator must surface the choice instead of guessing.

list.item: Operator — strategic decisions, phase gates, irreversible-action approval, persona checks. Can halt or park the loop at any tick.
Orchestrator (the active session) — phase selection, subagent dispatch by file reference, `state.md` updates, decision-log appends. Does NOT do research, code, tests, or commits itself.
Subagents — heavy work behind one task brief each. Save outputs to disk before returning a bounded summary. Run on `general-purpose` unless the task brief says otherwise.

section.title: Sibling-workflow composition
section.p: idea-to-prod composes sibling workflows by name from the matching phase. It does not duplicate their content.

list.item: Phase 3 plan + Phase 4 implement → invoke `../sdd-batch-orchestrator/` (study → clarify → plan → wave-execute → verify → review → fix → close).
For a media-pipeline project specifically (TG channel + site + automation), prefer `../media-ops/` instead of this umbrella.
For a queue of ≥30 independent batches (no SDD artifacts), prefer `../poll-agents/` instead of this umbrella.

section.reference: Per-phase invocation contract for the sibling workflows.
